## Pre-Brief Status

**Status**: PHASE_A_ADVISORY — This wave delivers governance documentation catch-up (canon files,
checklists, templates, and tracking artifacts). All deliverables are Tier 3 (governance canon
changes) or Tier 6 (documentation/admin). Per `INDEPENDENT_ASSURANCE_AGENT_CANON.md` §Trigger Table,
IAA is NOT required for T3/T6 PRs — CS2 Direct Review is sufficient.

**IAA Required**: NO — T3/T6 governance documentation wave
**CS2 Direct Review**: Required for merge authority
**Ceremony Level**: CS2 Direct Review per `INDEPENDENT_ASSURANCE_AGENT_CANON.md` §Risk-Tiered Ceremony Table

## Wave: ECAP / IAA Hardening Parity Catch-Up

**CS2 Authorization**: Issue — "Catch up governance repo to ISMS ECAP / IAA hardening parity

CodexAdvisor-agent permission for any agent-file work under this issue.

files created or modified in this wave (CodexAdvisor-agent route used if needed for G3).
